content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "昨天做了什麼？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你昨天做了什麼？可以從頭開始說嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zuótiān zuò le shénme? Kěyǐ cóng tóu kāishǐ shuō ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zuo2tian1 zuo4 le shen2me? Ke3yi3 cong2 tou2 kai1shi3 shuo1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "What did you do yesterday? Can you tell me from the beginning?",
          "translation_ko": "어제 뭐 하셨어요? 처음부터 말씀해 주시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好。昨天早上我先起床，然後刷牙洗臉，接著吃早餐。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo. Zuótiān zǎoshang wǒ xiān qǐchuáng, ránhòu shuāyá xǐliǎn, jiēzhe chī zǎocān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3. Zuo2tian1 zao3shang4 wo3 xian1 qi3chuang2, ran2hou4 shua1ya2 xi3lian3, jie1zhe5 chi1 zao3can1.",
          "translation_en": "Okay. Yesterday morning I first got up, then brushed my teeth and washed my face, and then ate breakfast.",
          "translation_ko": "네. 어제 아침에 먼저 일어나서, 이를 닦고 세수한 다음에 아침을 먹었어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "然後呢？",
          "pinyin": "Ránhòu ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ran2hou4 ne5?",
          "translation_en": "And then?",
          "translation_ko": "그다음에는요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "然後我去公司上班，中午吃午餐，下午繼續工作，最後下班回家。",
          "pinyin": "Ránhòu wǒ qù gōngsī shàngbān, zhōngwǔ chī wǔcān, xiàwǔ jìxù gōngzuò, zuìhòu xiàbān huí jiā.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ran2hou4 wo3 qu4 gong1si1 shang4ban1, zhong1wu3 chi1 wu3can1, xia4wu3 ji4xu4 gong1zuo4, zui4hou4 xia4ban1 hui2 jia1.",
          "translation_en": "Then I went to the company to work, ate lunch at noon, continued working in the afternoon, and finally got off work and went home.",
          "translation_ko": "그다음에 회사에 출근해서, 점심에 점심을 먹고, 오후에 계속 일하다가, 마지막으로 퇴근해서 집에 갔어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "聽起來很忙。你昨天有做別的事情嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Tīng qǐlái hěn máng. Nǐ zuótiān yǒu zuò bié de shìqing ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ting1 qi3lai2 hen3 mang2. Ni3 zuo2tian1 you3 zuo4 bie2 de shi4qing5 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Sounds busy. Did you do anything else yesterday?",
          "translation_ko": "바쁘셨나 봐요. 어제 다른 일도 하셨어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有。回家以後，我先休息一下，然後看電視，接著洗澡，最後睡覺。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu. Huí jiā yǐhòu, wǒ xiān xiūxi yīxià, ránhòu kàn diànshì, jiēzhe xǐzǎo, zuìhòu shuìjiào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3. Hui2 jia1 yi3hou4, wo3 xian1 xiu1xi5 yi1xia4, ran2hou4 kan4 dian4shi4, jie1zhe5 xi3zao3, zui4hou4 shui4jiao4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes. After going home, I first rested a bit, then watched TV, then took a shower, and finally slept.",
          "translation_ko": "네. 집에 돌아와서, 먼저 좀 쉬고, 그다음에 TV를 보고, 이어서 샤워하고, 마지막으로 잤어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the person do after getting up yesterday morning?",
          "question_ko": "어제 아침에 일어난 후에 무엇을 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Brushed teeth and washed face", "Went to work", "Ate lunch"],
          "options_ko": ["이를 닦고 세수했다", "출근했다", "점심을 먹었다"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the sequence words like 先, 然後, 接著, 最後.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell a short story about what you did yesterday, using 先, 然後, 接著, 最後."
    },
    {
      "title": "下班後做什麼？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你下班以後都做什麼？可以說一下順序嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xiàbān yǐhòu dōu zuò shénme? Kěyǐ shuō yīxià shùnxù ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 xia4ban1 yi3hou4 dou1 zuo4 shen2me? Ke3yi3 shuo1 yi1xia4 shun4xu4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "What do you usually do after work? Can you tell me the sequence?",
          "translation_ko": "퇴근 후에 보통 뭐 하세요? 순서를 말씀해 주시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好。我下班以後，先走路去捷運站，然後搭捷運回家。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo. Wǒ xiàbān yǐhòu, xiān zǒulù qù jiéyùn zhàn, ránhòu dā jiéyùn huí jiā.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3. Wo3 xia4ban1 yi3hou4, xian1 zou3lu4 qu4 jie2yun4 zhan4, ran2hou4 da1 jie2yun4 hui2 jia1.",
          "translation_en": "Okay. After work, I first walk to the MRT station, then take the MRT home.",
          "translation_ko": "네. 퇴근 후에, 먼저 걸어서 지하철역에 가고, 그다음에 지하철을 타고 집에 가요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "回家以後呢？",
          "pinyin": "Huí jiā yǐhòu ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hui2 jia1 yi3hou4 ne5?",
          "translation_en": "And after going home?",
          "translation_ko": "집에 돌아간 다음에는요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "回家以後，我先休息一下，然後吃晚餐，接著看書，最後準備明天的工作。",
          "pinyin": "Huí jiā yǐhòu, wǒ xiān xiūxi yīxià, ránhòu chī wǎncān, jiēzhe kàn shū, zuìhòu zhǔnbèi míngtiān de gōngzuò.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hui2 jia1 yi3hou4, wo3 xian1 xiu1xi5 yi1xia4, ran2hou4 chi1 wan3can1, jie1zhe5 kan4 shu1, zui4hou4 zhun3bei4 ming2tian1 de gong1zuo4.",
          "translation_en": "After going home, I first rest a bit, then eat dinner, then read a book, and finally prepare for tomorrow's work.",
          "translation_ko": "집에 돌아가면, 먼저 좀 쉬고, 그다음에 저녁을 먹고, 이어서 책을 보고, 마지막으로 내일 일을 준비해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你每天都是這樣嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ měitiān dōu shì zhèyàng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 mei3tian1 dou1 shi4 zhe4yang4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Do you do this every day?",
          "translation_ko": "매일 이렇게 하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "差不多。有時候會先洗澡再看書。",
          "pinyin": "Chàbùduō. Yǒu shíhou huì xiān xǐzǎo zài kàn shū.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Cha4bu4duo1. You3 shi2hou4 hui4 xian1 xi3zao3 zai4 kan4 shu1.",
          "translation_en": "More or less. Sometimes I take a shower first and then read.",
          "translation_ko": "거의 그래요. 가끔은 먼저 샤워하고 책을 보기도 해요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What does the person do after work first?",
          "question_ko": "퇴근 후에 가장 먼저 무엇을 합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Walk to the MRT station", "Eat dinner", "Read a book"],
          "options_ko": ["지하철역까지 걷는다", "저녁을 먹는다", "책을 본다"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the sequence: 先, 然後, 接著, 最後.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe your after-work routine using 先, 然後, 接著, 最後."
    },
    {
      "title": "週末的故事",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你上個週末做了什麼？可以從頭開始講故事嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ shàng ge zhōumò zuò le shénme? Kěyǐ cóng tóu kāishǐ jiǎng gùshì ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 shang4 ge5 zhou1mo4 zuo4 le shen2me? Ke3yi3 cong2 tou2 kai1shi3 jiang3 gu4shi4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "What did you do last weekend? Can you tell the story from the beginning?",
          "translation_ko": "지난 주말에 뭐 하셨어요? 처음부터 이야기를 들려주시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好。禮拜六早上我先起床，然後吃早餐，接著和朋友一起去公園散步。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo. Lǐbài liù zǎoshang wǒ xiān qǐchuáng, ránhòu chī zǎocān, jiēzhe hé péngyou yīqǐ qù gōngyuán sànbù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3. Li3bai4 liu4 zao3shang4 wo3 xian1 qi3chuang2, ran2hou4 chi1 zao3can1, jie1zhe5 he2 peng2you5 yi1qi3 qu4 gong1yuan2 san4bu4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay. Saturday morning I first got up, then ate breakfast, and then went for a walk in the park with a friend.",
          "translation_ko": "네. 토요일 아침에 먼저 일어나서, 아침을 먹고, 이어서 친구와 함께 공원에 산책하러 갔어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "然後呢？",
          "pinyin": "Ránhòu ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ran2hou4 ne5?",
          "translation_en": "And then?",
          "translation_ko": "그다음에는요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "然後我們去小吃店吃午餐，我點了牛肉麵，朋友點了滷肉飯。",
          "pinyin": "Ránhòu wǒmen qù xiǎochī diàn chī wǔcān, wǒ diǎn le niúròu miàn, péngyou diǎn le lǔròu fàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ran2hou4 wo3men5 qu4 xiao3chi1 dian4 chi1 wu3can1, wo3 dian3 le niu2rou4 mian4, peng2you5 dian3 le lu3rou4 fan4.",
          "translation_en": "Then we went to a small eatery for lunch. I ordered beef noodles, and my friend ordered braised pork rice.",
          "translation_ko": "그다음에 우리는 작은 음식점에 가서 점심을 먹었어요. 저는 소고기 국수를 시키고, 친구는 루로우판을 시켰어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "聽起來很好吃。下午你們做什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Tīng qǐlái hěn hǎochī. Xiàwǔ nǐmen zuò shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ting1 qi3lai2 hen3 hao3chi1. Xia4wu3 ni3men5 zuo4 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Sounds delicious. What did you do in the afternoon?",
          "translation_ko": "맛있겠네요. 오후에는 뭐 하셨어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "下午我們去看電影，看完以後去逛街，最後一起回家。",
          "pinyin": "Xiàwǔ wǒmen qù kàn diànyǐng, kàn wán yǐhòu qù guàngjiē, zuìhòu yīqǐ huí jiā.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xia4wu3 wo3men5 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3, kan4 wan2 yi3hou4 qu4 guang4jie1, zui4hou4 yi1qi3 hui2 jia1.",
          "translation_en": "In the afternoon we went to see a movie. After watching it, we went shopping, and finally went home together.",
          "translation_ko": "오후에는 영화를 보러 갔어요. 다 본 후에 쇼핑하러 갔다가, 마지막으로 함께 집에 돌아왔어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那天你開心嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nà tiān nǐ kāixīn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 tian1 ni3 kai1xin1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Were you happy that day?",
          "translation_ko": "그날 기분이 좋았어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "很開心！和朋友一起出去玩很有意思。",
          "pinyin": "Hěn kāixīn! Hé péngyou yīqǐ chūqù wán hěn yǒu yìsi.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hen3 kai1xin1! He2 peng2you5 yi1qi3 chu1qu4 wan2 hen3 you3 yi4si5.",
          "translation_en": "Very happy! Going out with friends was a lot of fun.",
          "translation_ko": "아주 좋았어요! 친구와 함께 나가서 노는 게 정말 재미있었어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the person eat for lunch on Saturday?",
          "question_ko": "토요일 점심에 무엇을 먹었습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Beef noodles", "Braised pork rice", "Both"],
          "options_ko": ["소고기 국수", "루로우판", "둘 다"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on the sequence words and the story flow.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell a story about your last weekend using 先, 然後, 接著, 最後."
    }
  ]
}
